title: Agreement between the Government of the United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland and the Government of the Republic of Uzbekistan concerning the procedure for the Ground Transit of Cargo from the Islamic Republic of Afghanistan through the territory of the Republic of Uzbekistan in connection with the Participation of the United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland in efforts to ensure the Security, Stabilisation and Reconstruction of the Islamic Republic of Afghanistan with Mandatory Involvement of the State Joint-Stock Railway Company 'Uzbekiston Temir Yullari'
subject: RAILWAYS
